description: Create a channel named 'HL7 Transformer Channel' in NextGen Connect to transform HL7 v2.x messages into XML format. The channel must use a TCP Listener source and a File Writer destination, with transformation logic to convert HL7 to XML and a <responseTransformer> element included in the destination connectors. Use the sample HL7 ORU^R01 message at /home/ga/sample_oru_message.hl7 for testing. Access the system via the terminal or the REST API at https://localhost:8443/api (credentials: admin/admin, header: 'X-Requested-With: OpenAPI'). The web dashboard at https://localhost:8443 is monitoring-only. Note that File Writer output files are created within the Docker container filesystem.
